rawIntent:
[Feature: Add a single GET /uptime route that returns JSON {uptimeSeconds: floor of proces — Phase 1: Phase 1: UptimeStatus model and IUptimeService interface]

Create src/modules/uptime/uptime.model.ts with the UptimeStatus interface containing uptimeSeconds: number. Create src/modules/uptime/uptime.service.interface.ts with the IUptimeService interface declaring getUptime(): UptimeStatus. Follow the exact same pattern as src/modules/status/status.model.ts and src/modules/status/status.service.interface.ts.

Phase architecture notes:
UptimeStatus is a transient read-only value object. IUptimeService defines the contract. No persistence, no identity.

Detailed phase architecture (architecture-agent):
